insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a streak and improving your scores over time. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can break down your learning goals into manageable chunks, track your growth, and develop a sense of accomplishment that will motivate you to continue learning and reaching new heights.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
